items.name: Jumpsuit Kulit Punk Indische
items.description:
🖤 Jumpsuit Kulit Gothic Punk Indische 🖤

Sebuah jumpsuit kulit bergaya gothic punk dengan sentuhan khas Indische yang unik. Didesain dengan detail strap, tekstur kulit gelap, serta aksen logam yang tegas, outfit ini memancarkan energi pemberontak dan elegan sekaligus. Siluetnya ramping, kuat, dan penuh karakter—sempurna untuk pemain yang ingin tampil berani, edgy, dan tak tertandingi di setiap dunia Roblox.

items.name: Olive OV-2A Helmet
items.description:
Since the Mk-22s addition to the BDO arsenal, development of affordable power armor have been in production oversight by the company's Overseer. Adopted after the final trials, this armor has a built in miniature reactor core capable of long lasting power while operating. The suit itself is vacuum sealed to offer protection while operating in space, but also protects against dangerous gasses.
